title: Robust Juicy Australian Prawns Skewers
description: A floral and juicy monsoon Australian dish featuring cayenne pepper, this recipe is perfect for those looking for a raw-friendly and fold-inspired meal. The combination of prawns, lemon, and herbs creates a robust flavor profile.
instructions: Preheat the grill to medium-high heat.
In a large bowl, whisk together lemon juice, olive oil, cayenne pepper, garlic, salt, and black pepper.
Add the prawns to the bowl and toss to coat with the marinade.
Thread the marinated prawns onto skewers, leaving a small space between each prawn.
Grill the skewers for 8-10 minutes, turning occasionally, until the prawns are pink and cooked through.
Garnish with chopped parsley and serve immediately.
Serve with a side of quinoa or rice to complete the meal.
Make sure to cook the prawns to an internal temperature of at least 145 degrees to ensure food safety.
